_notes.page_ref: Optional String attribute (S). Omitted for Phase 1 entries. Phase 4 populates with page/section ref.
_notes.embedding: Binary attribute (B). 384-dim float32 numpy array as raw bytes. Used by Phase 4 hybrid search.
_notes.text: String (S). FAQ answer text, truncated to 4000 chars for DynamoDB item size limit.
_notes.source_doc: String (S). Source PDF filename for RAG-02 source attribution.
_notes.department: String (S). PK. Department name e.g. finance, elections, planning, courts.
_notes.created_at: String (S). ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when chunk was ingested.
